nasb.text: At the hands of the apostles many signs and wonders were taking place among the people; and they were all with one accord in Solomon’s portico.

esv.text: Now many signs and wonders were regularly done among the people by the hands of the apostles. And they were all together in Solomon’s Portico.

cnv.text: 主藉著使徒的手，在民間行了許多神蹟奇事。他們都同心聚集在所羅門廊下，

ccb.text: 主借着使徒们在百姓中行了许多神迹奇事，大家同心合意地在所罗门廊那里聚会。

csbs.text: 主藉着使徒们的手，在民间行了很多神迹和奇事。信徒们都同心合意地聚集在所罗门柱廊里。
